title: sorbus graeca
intro: Sorbus graeca, also known as the Greek whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Greece and other parts of the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Sorbus graeca include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
